relations.note: Both govern the same chart section's visual system: container/shape structure plus the color logic applied within it.
Together define the full type hierarchy within a chart: headline, statistical callout, supporting text, and footnote.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Keep chart containers and shapes visually consistent and legible with the brand's soft, approachable geometry.
rules.rule_text: Chart/infographic containers use a uniform rounded-corner Light Blue panel (chart.container.fill = #E6F0F9) with a rounded Brand Blue header bar (chart.header.fill = #00529b), and bars/chart icons use rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops) to stay clean, easy to scan, and consistent with the system.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only in charts
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) accent colors (chart.color.emphasis)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.

rules.intent: Preserve visual hierarchy so emphasis colors draw the eye only to the most important data.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) (chart.color.dominant) are the dominant chart colors; Sunshine and Gold (chart.color.emphasis) are reserved exclusively for emphasizing key figures/data points and must not be used as general dominant fills. Placebo/comparator series use neutral gray (chart.color.placebo).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give chart headlines a consistent, brand-recognizable treatment that separates them from body data.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines are set in Agenda for print / Nunito Sans Bold+ for email (chart.headline.font), ALL CAPS (chart.headline.case), in Brand Blue (#00529b), underscored by a thin Gold rule (chart.headline.rule_color = #ffc60a).

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Ensure the most important data point reads first and footnote detail never competes with primary findings.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts in charts make the key % figure large and bold (the hero), with supporting copy set in a lighter weight beneath it; footnotes are noticeably smaller (chart.footnote.size = 12px/18px) and visually separated from the primary data, preserving a clear visual hierarchy from hero stat to supporting text to footnote.
